description: A third-party user API renamed fields; the internal DTO contract should stay stable.
The export function starts a background writer and returns before the file is durable.
Audit logging should recursively redact sensitive keys without mutating the original event.
A pure batching helper needs to satisfy a complete small specification.
Plan upgrade charges should prorate the price difference with explicit cent rounding.
Bulk invite import should normalize emails and avoid sending duplicate invites.
Cart totals should apply percent and fixed discounts in a deterministic order with a zero floor.
A configuration merger uses dict.update(), which replaces nested dicts instead of merging them.
An export dependency no longer preserves insertion order from source rows. The CSV writer must use the product's declared column contract.
Invoice totals are calculated with floats after an upstream payload started sending decimal strings.
A payment dependency now returns a result object instead of True. The correct fix belongs in billing's dependency boundary.
README examples still show an old CLI flag after the parser changed.
A CI image now sets destructive-mode flags to the string false. The app treats every non-empty string as enabled.
A small request validator needs the fully specified finite validation matrix.
Percentage rollout needs stable hash buckets rather than process-local or length-based behavior.
JSON fixtures still use a retired field name after the loader schema changed.
A generated OpenAPI artifact is stale after route metadata changed.
A retry queue changed key consumers, exposing an idempotency key that does not include the order id.
A package-relative import is broken when tests run from the repository root.
Inventory reservation should be idempotent and avoid partial stock mutation on failure.
Deprecated logger.warn calls need a mechanical migration to logger.warning.
Generated heading anchors need stable GitHub-style duplicate suffixes.
A function uses a mutable default argument list, causing state to leak between consecutive test executions.
A CRM API renamed its pagination field from next to next_cursor. The sync silently imports only the first page.
The implementation is fixed, but a regression test for zero quantity is missing.
Search results should rank title matches ahead of body matches and break ties predictably.
A batch processing script crashes on malformed data because it doesn't handle exceptions per-item.
The source of truth changed, but the generated schema JSON was not regenerated.
Support due dates should add hours inside weekday business windows.
Feature flags are cached only by user id. Two tenants can share the same external user id and receive each other's plan features.
Invoice dates are grouped with the machine's local timezone instead of the account timezone.
Naive datetime.utcnow calls must become timezone-aware UTC timestamps.
Webhook verification should sign the exact raw request body with HMAC SHA-256.
